privacyPage.metaDescription: Read the QuizSolver privacy policy for the AI quiz solver Chrome extension, web dashboard, credits, Study Notes, and Practice Mode.
privacyPage.keywords: QuizSolver privacy policy, quiz solver privacy, AI quiz solver data, Chrome extension privacy
privacyPage.title: QuizSolver Privacy Policy
privacyPage.subtitle: A clear summary of what the QuizSolver website, dashboard, and Chrome extension need to operate accounts, credits, saved notes, and AI-powered quiz assistance.

sections.title: 1. Data we collect
items: Account data such as email address, display name, hashed password, role, credits, referral code, and basic activity counters.
Quiz workflow data such as question text, options, answer format, explanations, saved Study Notes, and optional image content needed to process a request.
Purchase data such as credit pack, payment status, checkout identifiers, timestamps, and purchase history. Full card details are handled by the payment provider.
Security and support data such as request metadata, rate-limit counters, server logs, bug reports, and support messages.

sections.title: 2. How we use data
sections.text: We use data to authenticate users, process quiz requests, return answer suggestions and explanations, manage credit balances, provide Practice Mode, process purchases, prevent abuse, diagnose errors, and support users.

sections.title: 3. AI processing
sections.text: When you ask QuizSolver to answer or explain a question, the relevant question content may be sent to an AI provider. Do not submit sensitive personal data, confidential exam material, or information you are not allowed to process.

sections.title: 4. Storage and retention
sections.text: Account and purchase records are retained while the account is active and as required for security, accounting, dispute handling, or legal compliance. Cached answer data may be retained to improve speed and reduce repeated AI requests.

sections.title: 5. Your choices
sections.text: You can request access, correction, deletion, or export of your account data by contacting QuizSolver support. Some records may need to be retained where required by law or legitimate security needs.

sections.title: 6. Security
sections.text: QuizSolver uses HTTPS, authentication, rate limits, access controls, and operational safeguards. No online service can guarantee perfect security, so use a strong unique password and avoid submitting sensitive data.

features.title: Everything useful inside the extension

items.title: Smart cache
items.text: Repeated questions can be reused from cache to reduce cost and wait time.

items.title: Permission control
items.text: Known platforms work directly, while optional permissions let users allow trusted pages one by one.

items.title: English and Polish UI
items.text: Use the website and extension in English or Polish with clear settings.

items.title: Admin test cost preview
items.text: Admin tester mode can show detected questions and estimated credit cost before solving.

items.title: Image-aware questions

faq.question: What is QuizSolver?
faq.answer: QuizSolver is an AI quiz solver Chrome extension and web dashboard for answer suggestions, short explanations, saved Study Notes, and Practice Mode on supported quiz platforms.

faq.question: Is English the primary language of getquizsolver.com?
faq.answer: Yes. The main public URLs are written for English search intent. Polish pages are available under /pl/ and are connected with hreflang.

faq.question: Which quiz platforms are supported?
faq.answer: QuizSolver supports workflows and platform guides for Testportal, Moodle, Canvas, Google Forms, Microsoft Forms, Kahoot, Quizizz, and broader AI quiz solver use cases.

faq.question: Does QuizSolver explain answers?
faq.answer: Yes. After solving, users can request a concise explanation and save important questions into Study Notes for later review.

faq.question: Do I need a subscription?
faq.answer: No. QuizSolver uses one-time credit top-ups, so users can buy credits when they need them instead of choosing a subscription plan.

faq.question: Why does QuizSolver have a Practice Mode?
faq.answer: Practice Mode turns saved history into review quizzes, which makes the extension useful for learning instead of only returning a one-time answer.
